title: Community Ratings Improvements and Database Stuff

texts: Added a "Show Score Breakdowns" toggle in the Community Rankings page allowing users to see all the scores at once instead of having to hover.
Changed the layout in the Community Rankings page when the "Separate by Point Thresholds" is toggled on to make it clearer where each threshold starts and ends.
Added an announcement regarding a database maintenance coming next week.
Added automated retries on database requests in most cases of errors.
Shortened the animation time of the radar charts.
Changed the Recent Additions section in the homepage to not be collapsible after expanding. It will still always start collapsed when entering the homepage.
Fixed the computation bug mentioned in the previous update note.
